title: Brother and Marine Collide
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on brother and marine collide, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Brother and Marine Collide. Luffy runs into both Marines and his brother Ace in Nanohana, turning the Alabasta arrival into a chaotic reunion. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: In the outskirts of the port city Nanohana

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh, how lovely!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: This is just the kind of thing I like!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Sorry if I sound like I'm complaining after making you go out and buy clothes Samji, but...

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: These dresses make us look more like exotic dancers than inconspicuous civilians...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, it's all fine, isn't it? Often't dancers civilians as well?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Qts long as we don't look like pirates and you don't look like a princess, it's all good, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But to walk across the desert in this is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't worry, 9'll carry you if you get tired. Choho!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But compared to the 2 lovely ladies, the rest of you guys are just...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You might be trying to hide the fact that you're pirates,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But those outfits make you look like bandits!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How're we any different from you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hm? What's wrong, Chopperr?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Quack!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My nose feels like it's tearing apart...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is that so? Your nose must be quite sensitive, Chopperr.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Namohama is also famous for its perfumes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Perfume?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes, they're made from mixing very pungent ingredients so-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Like this one here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WaHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Spurt

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Spurt

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Stop that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ahhh, 9 could fall in love with you all the way to the gates of hell!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What're you, retarded?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What was that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: In any case, we now have all the supplies we need to cross the Alabasta desert...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So Vivi, where do we head from here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well... First, we have to stop the rebel forces!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can't predict when they'll start rampaging and needlessly shedding blood.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So we'll head over to the oasis town called Yuba,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And to go to Yuba, we-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Get down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Marimes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What're they doing here...!?

summary: This part highlights brother and marine collide and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
